# R_LIT

- purpose: Collection of independent Rust tools and libraries, no root Cargo workspace
- homepage: https://www.snappywatt.com/
- binaries: Pre-built binaries hosted at https://www.snappywatt.com/
- repository: https://github.com/dwbmio/r_lit

## Directory

- bulk_upload/ — Batch extract URLs from JSON, upload to S3-compatible storage
- img_resize/ — Image resizing and compression
- group_vibe_workbench/ — Desktop collaboration workbench (GPUI + P2P)
- pgpour/ — Postgres CDC → Kafka data pipeline (multi-topic fan-out, per-table routing)
- omniplan_covers_ding/ — Internal tool (external path dependency, not portable)
- video-generator/ — Video generation tools
- crates/murmur/ — P2P collaboration library (iroh-net + Automerge CRDT)

## Build

```bash
cd <tool_dir> && cargo build --release
```

See each subdirectory's README and llms.txt for details.
